name: Waukon State Bank
description_short: Waukon State Bank is a community bank offering personal and business deposit products, lending, and digital banking solutions through multiple locations.
description_long: Waukon State Bank is a local community bank serving its region with traditional banking services. The institution operates multiple physical locations and maintains a web presence at waukonstatebank.bank, positioning itself as a trusted local banking partner. The bank appears to have a history of service to its community and maintains active hiring for operational roles. Waukon State Bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking products including checking, savings, money market, health savings accounts, CDs, and IRAs. On the lending side, they provide residential real estate loans, personal loans, agricultural loans, and commercial loans. For business customers, they offer business checking and savings accounts, cash management services, and merchant credit card processing. Their digital offerings include internet banking, mobile banking with mobile deposit capabilities, electronic bill pay, and eStatements. The bank also provides traditional services like safe deposit boxes, night deposits, TeleBank access, debit and credit cards with reward options, and lines of credit with overdraft protection. A distinguishing feature is their participation in the Privileged Status ATM network, which provides surcharge-free access to over 1,000 ATMs. The bank has announced a modernization of their digital banking platform, indicating investment in technology infrastructure. Their marketing emphasizes competitive rates, friendly service, and personalized loan options for various life stages. However, as a regional community bank, they lack the extensive branch network, advanced fintech features, or investment products offered by larger national institutions. The available website content focuses on service offerings rather than detailed fee structures, account minimums, rate information, or regulatory compliance details.
services: Savings accounts and Money Market accounts
Debit and credit cards with rewards
pros: Access to 1,000+ surcharge-free ATMs through Privileged Status program
Offers agricultural loans, recognizing local farming community needs
Mobile banking app with mobile deposit and fund transfer capabilities
Multiple account types including HSAs, IRAs, and Money Market accounts
Merchant credit card processing for business customers
Cash management services for business accounts
Upcoming modernized digital banking platform with customizable features
cons: Limited information on website regarding specific APR rates, fees, or account minimums
As a regional bank, likely fewer physical locations than national competitors
No mention of investment products, wealth management, or advisory services
Website provides minimal detail on loan approval timelines or qualification requirements
No indication of partnerships with fintech platforms or premium digital-only services
best_for: Local residents and businesses in the Waukon area seeking community-focused banking
Agricultural customers needing specialized farm lending products
Small business owners requiring merchant processing and cash management services
Customers prioritizing in-person service and local decision-making over large national banks
diagnosis: Waukon State Bank is best for individuals and businesses in its service area seeking full-service community banking with competitive rates and personalized service. The main caveat is that detailed product terms, rates, and fees are not transparent on their website, requiring direct contact with the bank for specific information before account opening.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
